articles.title: Henry Zeffman: Andy Burnham offers a blueprint for his premiership
articles.description: Burnham offered a sense of what his time as prime minister would mean, but he did not lay out many details.

articles.title: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
articles.description: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

articles.title: The Good Life actress Dame Penelope Keith dies aged 86

articles.description: Two people have been arrested, one of whom is the suspected shooter, local police say.
